2026-04-16T03:38:38.1788879Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-16T03:38:38.1789329Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-16T03:38:38.1789706Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-16T03:38:38.1790023Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m

2026-04-16T03:40:08.9777253Z {"timestamp":"2026-04-16T03:39:47.354774465Z","direction":"IN","type":"RESPONSE","server_id":"github","payload":{"id":1,"jsonrpc":"2.0","result":{"content":[{"text":"{\"number\":58204,\"title\":\"[Mgmt Generator] Case-sensitive resource scope detection causes incorrect operation placement\",\"body\":\"## Bug Description\\n\\nThe management generator performs **case-sensitive** comparison when detecting the scope of a resource operation from its route path. This causes operations with non-standard casing in the route (e.g. \\\\/resourcegroups/\\\\ instead of \\\\/resourceGroups/\\\\) to be placed on the wrong scope.\\n\\n## Reproduction\\n\\nIn the ContainerInstance TypeSpec spec, the \\\\SubnetServiceAssociationLinkOperationGroup.delete\\\\ operation has the route:\\n\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/...\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\nNote \\\\\\nesourcegroups\\\\ (lowercase \\u0026#39;g\\u0026#39;). The generator fails to recognize this as a ResourceGroup-scoped operation and places it on \\\\SubscriptionResource\\\\ instead of \\\\ResourceGroupResource\\\\.\\n\\n### Expected behavior\\nThe operation should be placed on \\\\MockableContainerInstanceResourceGroupResource\\\\ (ResourceGroup scope).\\n\\n### Actual behavior  \\nThe operation is placed on \\\\MockableContainerInstanceSubscriptionResource\\\\ (Subscription scope).\\n\\n## Suggested Fix\\n\\nThe scope detection comparison should be **case-insensitive** since ARM route paths are case-insensitive.\\n\\n## Context\\n\\nFound during ContainerInstance mgmt SDK migration to TypeSpec (new mgmt generator):\\n- SDK PR: #58067\\n- Spec PR: Azure/azure-rest-api-specs#42361\",\"state\":\"open\",\"html_url\":\"https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/issues/58204\",\"user\":{\"login\":\"ArcturusZhang\",\"id\":10554446,\"profile_url\":\"https://github.com/ArcturusZhang\",\"avatar_url\":\"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/10554446?v=4\"},\"author_association\":\"MEMBER\",\"reactions\":{\"total_count\":1,\"+1\":0,\"-1\":0,\"laugh\":0,\"confused\":0,\"heart\":0,\"hooray\":0,\"rocket\":0,\"eyes\":1},\"created_at\":\"2026-04-16T03:37:04Z\",\"updated_at\":\"2026-04-16T03:37:04Z\"}","type":"text"}]}}}

2026-04-16T03:40:08.9793891Z {"timestamp":"2026-04-16T03:39:47.553587553Z","direction":"IN","type":"RESPONSE","server_id":"github","payload":{"id":1,"jsonrpc":"2.0","result":{"content":[{"text":"{\"number\":58204,\"title\":\"[Mgmt Generator] Case-sensitive resource scope detection causes incorrect operation placement\",\"body\":\"## Bug Description\\n\\nThe management generator performs **case-sensitive** comparison when detecting the scope of a resource operation from its route path. This causes operations with non-standard casing in the route (e.g. \\\\/resourcegroups/\\\\ instead of \\\\/resourceGroups/\\\\) to be placed on the wrong scope.\\n\\n## Reproduction\\n\\nIn the ContainerInstance TypeSpec spec, the \\\\SubnetServiceAssociationLinkOperationGroup.delete\\\\ operation has the route:\\n\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/...\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\nNote \\\\\\nesourcegroups\\\\ (lowercase \\u0026#39;g\\u0026#39;). The generator fails to recognize this as a ResourceGroup-scoped operation and places it on \\\\SubscriptionResource\\\\ instead of \\\\ResourceGroupResource\\\\.\\n\\n### Expected behavior\\nThe operation should be placed on \\\\MockableContainerInstanceResourceGroupResource\\\\ (ResourceGroup scope).\\n\\n### Actual behavior  \\nThe operation is placed on \\\\MockableContainerInstanceSubscriptionResource\\\\ (Subscription scope).\\n\\n## Suggested Fix\\n\\nThe scope detection comparison should be **case-insensitive** since ARM route paths are case-insensitive.\\n\\n## Context\\n\\nFound during ContainerInstance mgmt SDK migration to TypeSpec (new mgmt generator):\\n- SDK PR: #58067\\n- Spec PR: Azure/azure-rest-api-specs#42361\",\"state\":\"open\",\"html_url\":\"https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/issues/58204\",\"user\":{\"login\":\"ArcturusZhang\",\"id\":10554446,\"profile_url\":\"https://github.com/ArcturusZhang\",\"avatar_url\":\"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/10554446?v=4\"},\"author_association\":\"MEMBER\",\"reactions\":{\"total_count\":1,\"+1\":0,\"-1\":0,\"laugh\":0,\"confused\":0,\"heart\":0,\"hooray\":0,\"rocket\":0,\"eyes\":1},\"created_at\":\"2026-04-16T03:37:04Z\",\"updated_at\":\"2026-04-16T03:37:04Z\"}","type":"text"}]}}}
